name: AEON Credit Service (Asia) Company Limited
summary: AEON Credit Service (Asia) Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the consumer finance business primarily in Hong Kong. It operates through three segments: Credit Cards, Personal Loans, and Insurance. The Credit Card segment offers credit card services to individuals; and acquiring services for member stores. The Personal Loans segment provides personal loan financing services to individuals. The Insurance segment offers insurance agency and brokerage services. It also provides card payment processing and microfinance services. The company was founded in 1987 and is headquartered in Tsim Sha Tsui, Hong Kong. AEON Credit Service (Asia) Company Limited is a subsidiary of AEON Financial Service (Hong Kong) Co., Limited.
